name: Arbitration Agreement
text: Any dispute arising out of this Agreement shall be referred to arbitration in accordance with the Arbitration and Conciliation Act, 1996.

legal_basis.note: Seat of arbitration — determines supervisory court

title: Arbitration

jurisdiction_constraints.general: Seat city determines supervisory High Court: Mumbai → Bombay HC; Delhi → Delhi HC; Bangalore → Karnataka HC

dispute_hotspots: Missing seat — most common drafting error in Indian arbitration clauses
Inoperative arbitration clause — named institution no longer exists
Challenge to arbitrator appointment — S.12 conflict of interest
